repo.description: Tensorflow implementation for "Improved Transformer for High-Resolution GANs" (NeurIPS 2021).

terms.context_snippet: HiT-GAN presents a Transformer-based generator that is trained based on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). It achieves state-of-the-art performance for high-resolution image synthesis. Please check our NeurIPS 2021 paper "[Improved Transformer for High-Resolution GANs](http…

HiT-GAN presents a Transformer-based generator that is trained based on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). It achieves state-of-the-art performance for high-resolution image synthesis. Please check our NeurIPS 2021 paper "[Improved Transformer for High-Resolution GANs](http…
